title: trifolium hirtum
intro: Trifolium hirtum, also known as hairy clover or hairy trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Trifolium hirtum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
